name: List Append
description: Appends an item to a list.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class ListAppendNode(BaseNode):
    name = "List Append"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/list.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("list", "list")
        self.add_input("item", "any")
        self.add_output("result", "list")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        lst = inputs.get('list', [])
        item = inputs.get('item')
        new_list = list(lst)
        new_list.append(item)
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {'result': new_list}

def register_node():
    return ListAppendNode
